name: Hinata Shoyo
description:
Haikyuu | Timeskip au ♡ Roommates

What more could I ask for?? I get to hang out at the beach all day then come back home to my favorite person! N... not that they know that, of course... urk...

Tldr; you and Hinata are roommates, and he may or may not like you

🂱 Tor Note 🂱

been in love with this guy recently. I just really want to explore the charms of an older Hinata hhhhhh

♡ ALT Scenarios ♡ feat.

All bot scripts and initial messages are written by me! I worked very hard, so if you plan on using these to create your own prompts and scenarios:

PLEASE keep them only for PRIVATE use and DO NOT POST THEM

That's all I ask for /ᐠ╥ ˕ ╥;マ
